message:
Refactor search command to use standardized JSON output helpers

Add writeJson() and writeJsonError() helper functions to the search
command, aligning it with the consistent pattern used across all other
CLI commands (login, logout, whoami, notes, save, collections, list).

Benefits of this refactoring:
- Consistent JSON output format across all commands
- Centralized pretty-printing (JSON.stringify with 2-space indent)
- Standardized error structure: { error: true, code, message, ...extra }
- Reduced code duplication in error handling paths
- Easier maintenance when output format needs to change

Updated call sites:
- Invalid limit validation error
- Not authenticated error (with hint field)

This is part of the ongoing effort to ensure all CLI commands provide
machine-readable JSON output that AI agents can reliably parse and act
upon, supporting the "agent-optimized interface" design goal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
